description: Loved my experience and will definitely spread the word to other businesses if they are looking for this platform.
author: Veronica B.
pros: I loved how user friendly Tinq is! Not difficult to navigate and loved the added wigits! :)
cons: Nothing I disliked about it, for a quick second it wasn't sending my timesheets to my Payroll department but that was because I didn't use the link sent by Tinq - I created my own profile.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Tinq survived a field of many in two blind studies
description: In a previous organization, I was tasked with finding a replacement for their time clock system. I researched through more than 25 products, and finally narrowed the field to Tinq. At the time of the research, Tinq was not the least of the investment. But the features and support were what made the decision easy. When I took over as I.T. Manager at my current position, I was again tasked with finding a timeclock solution. Rather than going through a field of many products, I immediately called my contact at Tinq and began the process of setting Tinq up. The product is simple to setup, allows for many types of industries to use it, and the employees find that the product is completely intuitive.
author: Brian W.
pros: The interface is intuitive, the price is affordable, the management is comprehensive, the structure is robust.
cons: I would like more access to the backend of the product and ability to create api interfacing for Quickbooks Desktop. I would also like to have the ability to customize the kiosk app to include our company information.

author: Kim K.
pros: remote sign in on computer and mobile device
cons: employees are able to log out of the system when they clock in and out.

description: A simple to use platform that is the lifeblood of any business. Accurate time tracking is key, especially with all the new features Tinq provides. With additions like Project Management and Task Management, Tinq is becoming a bigger part of our business's operations. The customer service is second to none, and our team loves how easy and intuitive the app is.
author: Chris H.
pros: Tinq makes it easy to get up and running quickly. Team members love how easy it is to use, and the fact that they have more oversight into verifying their time sheets. Time off requests makes it such an easy process for anyone to request time off, and for an Admin to review these requests. Geotagging is also such a benefit when it comes to seeing where time entries were performed.
cons: No complaints. Software is updated often with improvements and new fatures.

description: Overall our experience is great.
author: Emily K.
pros: We utilize the time tracking and report functions for payroll which is helpful to show the employees if they have questions. I have also had great customer service/support experiences with Tinq.
cons: Nothing at this time. All of our needs are met, and there are more functions for us to use if we chose to do so.

description: It’s very great it makes time tracking so easy and hardly any time adjustments
author: Perla M.
pros: What I like the most that you don’t require a long passcode to get clocked in and it’s very efficient because it does ask for a quick selfie before and after you clock in and out
cons: There is nothing I don’t like about Tinq

description: It’s Been easy to use. No major technical issues
author: Sean O.
pros: Easy off access across mobile apps. Convenient to open and close out with active tracking. Good way to have your task items tracked by a supervisor or yourself. Especially for billables
cons: Only thing is when i search for a time that I manually entered after that it automatically submits that time. I would rather have it show up in pending so Incan then submit it. Otherwise I’ll have to toggle between pending and submitted time sheets

description: It's been a nice switch. I really like the app.
author: Lisa P.
pros: I like that I have the clock-in accessibility in from the app. We work in homeless services and sometimes we have to work in the field so this makes it easy to clock in from anywhere and my supervisor know where I am when I clock in.
cons: Sometimes it will keep us clocked in when we have clocked out previously.

description: Positive experience with Tinq. I would recommend it to other small business owners.
author: Britton S.
pros: Easy to set up and easy to understand. The functionality of the application is intuitive. A great way to track your time for yourself and or employees.
cons: There are some UI issues that could be polished up. Although the development team has fixed many of them already.

description: Had a great experience
author: Rebecca F.
pros: Reporting feature, customer service always being available, easy/fast to clock in/out, mobile ability
cons: I know now your product integrates with Quickbooks. Before I knew this, this was problematic. We chose a new system that integrates with Quickbooks for easier payroll capabilities.

review_title: Does what you expect - easy to use
description: This has been a great option for us to allow employees to clock in and to track their hours. We use a different system for PTO.
author: Katrina B.
pros: The system is pretty easy to figure out and use. From an administrator side it's easy to track hours. The ability to determine on an individual basis if someone is allowed to clock in from somewhere outside of the office is very helpful.
cons: It is not unusual for the system to glitch. It doesn't happen every week, but it does happen.

author: Thomas K.
pros: Being able to use the Tinq app on my mobile device is a great feature and extremely convenient.
cons: On the iPad version of the Tinq app, the orientation is locked in the horizontal position, which could be inconvenient for companies who have a wall mounted kiosk station where the iPad is mounted vertically (this happened to my company).

description: It was ok. We had to leave tinq because tinq only supports with two payroll companies which is unfortunate when we left Gusto
author: stacey B.
pros: I liked that Tinq was easy to use for the employees and managers
cons: Tinq kiosk would consistently go down and the support had no reason to explain this and it wasnt a wifi problem

description: My overall experience is great. I have been using Tinq for several months now, and I must say it has completely transformed the way I work.
author: Piyush P.
pros: I like the below features of Tinq product. 1. User-Friendly Interface and experience 2. Indication of status with different color 3. Prioritized features components 4. Clean UI 5. Easy to understands the data and easy to navigate
cons: Tinq is a great tool overall, It is more effective and user-friendly product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Ting was replaced our regular working timesheet
author: Huong T.
pros: I like the working hour intergrade to QuickBooks payrolls.
cons: Unfortunately the Statutory holiday hour coloum is not separated when integrating to QuickBooks online for payrolls.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: lara K.
pros: The time sheet tracking system is incredibly easy to use and makes changing timing or requesting sick leave a breeze. It also offers a variety of interesting features for project management that I'm eager to explore.
cons: Everything is generally good, but unfortunately, our company didn't upload vacation hours into the system, so I can't track them at the moment."
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: easy to use and we can use it in any electronica device.
description: I have been using it for a few months but it is the best application I have ever seen. when I get my paycheck I always open Tinq to see my hours and I am confident about it sowing the right hours. Thank you for Tinq and our company.
author: Mosmi P.
pros: easy to use and we can use it on any electronic device. software is very easy nothing is confusing. the most important is I always forget to clock in and out so I just send a request to management, and they edit in just a few seconds.
cons: Need internet to because few days ago we had some issue on the internet so we have to use our old process to punch in and out time. but the management department edit our time so overall is good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very easy to use software. Some customizable features on the dashboard are fun to use.
author: Keone S.
pros: Very easy to use, intuitive and responsive support
cons: some bugs on the web browser but very minor

description: Keeping up to date with time and procedures
author: Ronda H.
pros: I like that it updates immediately and you can run reports up to date. Easy to use
cons: I can't think of anything I would change. I like the layout

description: Tinq has been easy to use and convenient.
author: Carrie P.
pros: I love the fact that I can use it when I'm in the field and need to take lunch.
cons: It will very rarely not work on my phone.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Amazing experience
author: Nairy S.
pros: Very easy to work with as admin and employee! My employees loves working on Tinq self explanatory and user friendly! Great support team! Highly recommended
cons: Every thing is perfect! No complaints
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rutu S.
pros: It's so convenient to clock in, clock out, and track my break times with just a few taps on my phone. It has reduced the hassle of manual time tracking, and I no longer have to worry about keeping a physical timecard.
cons: occasional technical glitches or connectivity issues can disrupt the clock-in/clock-out process, which can be frustrating for both employees and employers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tajinder S.
pros: Easy to use, beautiful interface, Good customer service
cons: Nothing here, everything is good. Nice product
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great!
author: nicky K.
pros: It's easy to use and keeps all your timesheets neat and in one place.
cons: There isn't anything I've found that I don't like
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, my experience with TinQ has been positive. It meets the basic requirements for attendance tracking and is easy to use.
author: Thi Phuong Thao T.
pros: TinQ makes attendance tracking a breeze. It's user-friendly and allows me to quickly log in and check my attendance. The interface is clean and intuitive.
cons: I wish there was an option for notifications or reminders for upcoming check-ins.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
